---
title: "&nbsp;"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## **Team**<br>
<br>

### See [here](opportunities.html) for current opportunities to join the team.
<br>

<div class = "row">

<div class="col-md-4 text-center" style="margin-bottom:40px">
<img src="Portrait/Lu Zong.jpg" width="220"><br><br>

**Lu Zong (宗璐)(https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Lu-Zong-2)**  
Postdoc (2023– )  
Seed dispersal
</div>

<div class="col-md-4 text-center" style="margin-bottom:40px">
<img src="Portrait/Xiao Huang.jpg" width="220"><br><br>

**[Xiao Huang (黄猇)](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Xiao-Huang-huangxiao)**  
PhD student (2022– )  
Frugivory and seed dispersal
</div>

<div class="col-md-4 text-center" style="margin-bottom:40px">
<img src="Portrait/Hao-Yu Wang.jpg" width="220"><br><br>

**[Hao-Yu Wang (王昊羽)](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Hao-Yu-Wang-4)**  
PhD student (2023– )  
Seed predation and stoichiometry
</div>

</div>



<div class="row">

<div class="col-md-4 text-center" style="margin-bottom:40px">
<img src="Portrait/Vincent Kipngetich.jpg" width="220"><br><br>

**Vincent Kipngetich (成伟)**  
Master student (2023– )  
Wind-mediated seed dispersal
</div>

<div class="col-md-4 text-center" style="margin-bottom:40px">
<img src="Portrait/Lin Xie.jpg" width="220"><br><br>

**[Lin Xie (解琳)](https://orcid.org/0009-0004-3662-0778)**  
Master student (2024– )  
Urban ecology and environment education
</div>

<div class="col-md-4 text-center" style="margin-bottom:40px">
<img src="Portrait/Feng Dai.jpg" width="220"><br><br>

**Feng Dai (戴冯)**  
Master student (2025– )  
AI for plant traits
</div>

</div>



<div class="row">

<div class="col-md-4 text-center" style="margin-bottom:40px">
<img src="Portrait/Long Wang.jpg" width="220"><br><br>

**Long Wang (王龙)**  
Master student (2025– )  
Wind-mediated seed dispersal
</div>

</div>

<hr>



## **Alumni**

<br>

<div class="row">

<div class="col-md-4 text-center" style="margin-bottom:40px">
<img src="Portrait/Fan-Yu Fu.jpg" width="220"><br><br>

**Fan-Yu Fu (付帆宇)**  
Master student (2021–2024)  
Seed defences
</div>

<div class="col-md-4 text-center" style="margin-bottom:40px">
<img src="Portrait/Zhi-An Hu.jpg" width="220"><br><br>

**Zhi-An Hu (胡志安)**  
Master student (2021–2024)  
Plant phenology
</div>

<div class="col-md-4 text-center" style="margin-bottom:40px">
<img src="Portrait/Qing-Qing Xu.jpg" width="220"><br><br>

**Qing-Qing Xu (徐庆庆)**  
Master student (2022–2025)  
Pollution impacts on plant regeneration
</div>

</div>

<hr>

**La-Mei Wu (伍腊梅)**: PhD student at Xishuangbanna Tropical Botanical Garden (2015-2020)<br>

**Yan Xiao (肖燕)**: PhD student at Xishuangbanna Tropical Botanical Garden (2017-2023)<br>

**Fahmida Nitu**: MSc student at Imperial College London (2020-2021)<br>

**Phoebe Blair**: Undergraduate intern at the University of Cambridge (2019)<br>

**Xue-Lin Chen (陈雪琳)**: Undergraduate intern at Nanchang University (2022-2024)<br>

**Xu-Ze Dong (董绪泽)**: Undergraduate intern at Nanchang University (2022-2023)<br>

**Zi-Rui Chen (陈紫瑞)**: Undergraduate intern at Southwest University (2022-2023)<br>

**Yi-Hao Yuan (袁艺豪)**: Undergraduate intern at Southwest University (2022-2023)<br>

**Jia-Ze Li (李佳择)**: Undergraduate intern at Henan Normal University (2023)<br>

**Yue Lu (卢玥)**: Undergraduate intern at Imperial College London (2024)<br>

**Xi-Ning Zhao (赵希宁)**: Undergraduate intern at Central China Normal University (2025)<br>
